insight: The proposal count is NOT a project count. Only ~49% of EC proposals are fresh new projects; the rest are re-appraisals, transfers, expansions and amendments on land that already holds a clearance.
caveat: 'Proposal For' is self-declared and 7,410 are blank + some generic 'Mining EC Under 5 Ha' without a New/Re-appraisal suffix -- classified as unclassified, not forced. Fresh includes 'Fresh EC', 'Fresh ToR' and 'Mining (New)'; re-use captures re-appraisal, transfer/bidder-registration and expansion; admin captures amendment/extension/corrigendum/splitting/surrender.
